terms.title: HM3D (Habitat-Matterport 3D)
terms.summary: HM3D (Habitat-Matterport 3D) belongs to the Computer Vision area of AI/ML. It sits inside Computer Vision. Compare it with VoxelNet for 3D Object Detection and I3D Inflated 3D ConvNet.
